title: UPSC – Scientist B – 46 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UPSC Scientist B Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 46 Posts
basic_details.short_information: UPSC Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 46 vacancies for Scientist B posts. Candidates can apply online only from 23 May to 12 June 2026 through UPSC website upsc.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: India Meteorological Department (IMD), Ministry of Earth Sciences

qualification.education_qualification: Varies by Scientist-B discipline as prescribed in the notification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC

selection_process: Recruitment by Selection, Interview or Recruitment Test followed by Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the UPSC Online Recruitment Application portal at https://upsconline.nic.in/ora/. The application process includes registration, completion of the Common Application Form, and filling the vacancy-specific module during the application window.
seo_tags: Union Public Service Commission Scientist B Recruitment 2026
